name: Cueport
subtitle: A local-first music player for DJs
description: Start on your Mac, where Cueport reads your Serato library. Pair the iPhone to the Mac over your local network, send some crates across, and play them anywhere. The Mac app is the source of truth and the iPhone app pairs to it.

shipNotes.title: Cueport 0.3: cue and note write-back, collection publishing, restore points
included: Edit cue points in the Cueport DB; staged into a private copy before touching your live files
Edit track notes (the ID3 Comment / Serato 'Comment' column) inline in the track table
Review cue and note diffs before staging; see exactly what changed per slot
Publish staged edits to your live Serato library with one click
Collection write-back: create, rename, delete, reorder collections and publish the .crate files
Per-publish restore points: every publish snapshots the replaced files; roll back from inside the app
Full safety copy of _Serato_ on link; 24-hour cooldown; manual copy anytime
Waveform strip with real Serato overview peaks and beatgrid markers
Drag-and-drop track reorder within a collection
